data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Rate limiting protection', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for rate limiting protection, yet none of the prior steps demonstrate any implementation or testing of this feature. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence needed to support the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of rate limiting protection in the prior steps.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
